task.title: Implement context memory policy in skills and loops
task.summary: Teach agents when to use session RAM, views, canonical docs, subagents, and ThinkCode so default workflows minimize repeated token load.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki skills and loops default to tiny views and targeted expansion instead of reloading raw wiki state into the parent session.
acceptance: Planning, task, verification, research, and architecture skills describe RAM vs persistent memory rules.
Default flow starts from status view and recommended next reads.
Agents track loaded view revisions and avoid rereading unchanged views when possible.
Task and outer-loop instructions explain when to spawn subagents or ThinkCode.
non_goals: Build new view schemas from scratch if TASK-018 is not done.

delta.desired: Agent workflow policy explicitly optimizes context-window usage.
delta.current: Skills mention compact state but do not fully model session RAM, views, subagents, and ThinkCode together.
delta.closure: Skills and loop prompts encode the memory policy.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: Planning, task, verification, research, and architecture skills describe RAM vs persistent memory rules.
Default flow starts from status view and recommended next reads.
Agents track loaded view revisions and avoid rereading unchanged views when possible.
Task and outer-loop instructions explain when to spawn subagents or ThinkCode.

non_goals: Build new view schemas from scratch if TASK-018 is not done.
